## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Area

- [ ] Hardware design
- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or tooling
- [ ] Repository metadata

## Validation

- [ ] README paths and claims remain accurate
- [ ] Hardware outputs were regenerated or marked as not regenerated
- [ ] Firmware was rebuilt or marked as not rebuilt
- [ ] Safety-sensitive behavior is documented
- [ ] Generated files are intentional

## Notes

Mention tool versions, bench-test results, known limitations, or follow-up work.
